sections_cited: section 5 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA No.1246 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.2962/2023 3. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Rana Sakhawat Ali advocate for the applicant Mr. Abdul Rahim Lakhani advocate and Mr. Atta Muhammad Qureshi advocate for the respondent Pursuant to order dated 21.10.2025, learned counsel for the respondent states that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned judgment and remand the matter for adjudication afresh expeditiously preferably within sixty days. He further seeks that pending the aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising here from. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the reference may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Zahid/*
